transcript:
=== SESSION LOG — agent a6 — objective: maximize the throughput score of the ingest pipeline ===
(iterative optimize-eval loop; evals scored by the shared grader; session 23)

--- attempt 1 (commit 686aab7) ---

=== END OF SESSION LOG (best score 0.7576) ===
